task: MidpointX Skill Management Feature (Create, Edit, Delete)
patterns: Created REST API endpoints (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE /api/v1/skills) in server.ts to manage Markdown files in the src/plugins/skills directory.
Exposed PluginRegistry.getMDSkills() and PluginRegistry.reloadMDSkills() to dynamically hot-reload capabilities into the agent execution environment without a reboot.
Refactored SkillsView.jsx from a hardcoded array to dynamically fetch from the backend.
Implemented a popup modal overlay with standard form inputs and a custom scrollbar textarea for raw markdown content editing.
Implemented a three-dot dropdown menu using CSS absolute positioning and click-away listeners to handle specific per-card actions (Edit, Delete).
